subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letters have been received and perused with the utmost care. The constraints and multitude of affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه های شما رسید و بدقت تمام ملاحظه گردید تنگی امور و کثرت
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
